final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing WeChat Official Account article cover image for a fragrance new-product launch titled "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香".

Style/medium: premium editorial cover, high-end luxury texture aesthetic
Composition: centered composition with title as the dominant visual element
Subject: fragrance product launch theme — "染秋" new fragrance, evoking autumn color and lingering scent
Scene/backdrop: soft autumnal atmosphere — warm amber and golden tones suggesting fallen leaves, drifting fragrance
Lighting/mood: warm, refined, slightly moody; soft diffused light with gentle depth
Color palette: warm amber, deep ochre, muted gold, soft cream — autumn palette
Materials/textures: smooth matte surface with subtle paper or fabric texture; elegant typographic treatment
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title text must be prominently displayed and legible; centered layout; aspect ratio 900×500 (16:9-ish wide banner)
Avoid: busy backgrounds that compete with the title, cold or neon colors, generic stock-photo autumn clichés
